summary: Re-tested Chispa after 3 changes: (1) Connector mandatory user_idea ≥10 chars, (2) Fredoka + Nunito Google Fonts loaded in _layout.tsx, (3) HD mascot assets + white background. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests PASSED in 37s (all 5 AI endpoints, including level1/level4 daily challenge, feedback XP range, trainer chat, concepts generate + fuse with and without user_idea). Frontend full E2E on 420x900 mobile viewport: onboarding 3 steps → home → connector (Fusionar correctly disabled at 0/4 chars, enabled at ≥10, helper '(X/10)' progress shown, +15 XP granted, shuffle reloads new concepts) → challenge (load + submit + AI feedback +10 XP) → trainer (AI Socratic Spanish reply received) → profile. Fredoka headings render visibly ('Conector de conceptos', 'Reto diario', 'Bisociaciones', 'Chispa' hero) and Nunito body too. ZERO font-related console errors, ZERO critical console errors. Mascot poses observed: sleepy_curl (loading), play_bow (intro), running (result), curious_up (input filled). No regressions detected.

minor.issue: Same low-priority item from iteration_1 still open: upstream LLM ChatError (budget/rate) maps to generic HTTP 502 instead of 503 with a friendly Spanish message. Not encountered in this run (11/11 green) but the code path in claude_call already maps budget/quota/rate to 503 — actually verified server.py lines 110-118 do handle it. Earlier minor item RESOLVED in code review.

issues: Harmless web-only warnings persist (useNativeDriver, expo-notifications push token on web) — already noted in iteration_1, no action needed.
Connector helper text wording is great; consider making the helper text use COLORS.coral (red) while length<10 to give an even stronger visual cue (currently it's muted gray). Minor polish.

action_items: (NONE blocking) All requested features verified working. No regressions from the 3 changes (mandatory ≥10 char fusion, Fredoka/Nunito fonts, HD mascot/white bg).
(OPTIONAL polish) Color the connector helper text in red (COLORS.coral) when length<10 for stronger visual feedback that an input is required.
critical_code_review_comments: _layout.tsx font loading is correct: useFonts gates render with `if (!loaded) return null;` and SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync + hideAsync is properly paired.

Setting RNText.defaultProps.style globally to Nunito is a clean way to apply the body font everywhere; Fredoka is applied explicitly via FONTS.heading on titles (verified in connector.tsx headerTitle, conceptText, fusionTitle).

Connector.fuse() correctly validates trimmed length ≥10 BEFORE the API call and shows a friendly Alert; the Fusionar button is also disabled when trimmed.length<10 — double guard. XP +15 is granted only on a successful API response (inside the try block before catch), so failed API calls do NOT award XP. Correct.
applyChallengeCompletion (from storage.ts) handles XP + streak atomically before saveProfile — persistence is correct.
All 5 AI endpoints async/await correctly, no MongoDB _id leaks (stateless backend, no DB).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (onboarding, home, challenge, trainer, connector with new mandatory-fusion logic, profile — all flows pass, fonts load without errors, mascot poses dynamic)

seed_data_creation: None — app is stateless on backend; AsyncStorage on device.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_chispa_api.py — rerun with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Frontend public URL https://chispa-trainer.preview.emergentagent.com. Use 420x900 mobile viewport. Key testIDs unchanged: onboarding-start/next/finish, onboarding-purpose-{trabajo|arte|problemas|diversion}, home-daily-challenge-card, home-trainer-card, home-connector-card, home-open-profile, challenge-input/submit/feedback, trainer-input/send, connector-input/fuse/shuffle/result, concept-a/concept-b, back-button. AsyncStorage clears each new Playwright context so flows always start at /onboarding.
